key_predictive_features: Central bank gold buying (indirect silver support)

fundamental_drivers.supply_deficit: 5th consecutive year of supply deficit. Mine output declining as silver is 70%+ byproduct of base metal mining.
fundamental_drivers.industrial_demand: Solar PV, EV, and AI data center demand accelerating. Structural demand growth outpacing supply additions.
fundamental_drivers.central_bank_diversification: Central bank gold buying supports metals complex broadly, creating indirect tailwind for silver.
fundamental_drivers.mine_output: Primary silver mine output declining. New project pipeline thin. Supply response to price is slow due to byproduct economics.

cross_asset_correlations.XAU: 0.85+ (strong positive, gold-silver ratio is key relative value metric)
cross_asset_correlations.US10Y_real: -0.6 (moderate inverse, higher real yields = precious metals headwind)
cross_asset_correlations.oil: 0.3 (weak positive, energy cost input to mining)

seasonal_patterns.strong_months: January-March (historically strong, post-year-end rebalancing + industrial restocking)
seasonal_patterns.current_position: Late May — entering historically mixed summer period

recommended_new_signals.description: Track rolling 5-day net ETF flow momentum for silver ETFs (SLV, PSLV). Contrarian BUY on extreme outflows, momentum SELL on euphoric inflows.
Week-over-week change in Managed Money net positioning. Large increases in net long signal trend continuation, large decreases signal potential reversal.
Z-score of gold-silver ratio vs 60-day rolling mean. Extreme readings (>2 or <-2) signal mean-reversion in relative value.
Composite of copper price, solar ETF performance, and EV sales data as proxy for silver industrial demand trajectory.

deep_dives.implementation_notes: XAG accuracy at 49.4% is near random. Primary issue is regime-blind signal application — mean-reversion signals fire during trends and trend signals fire during ranges. Silver currently at $73 correcting from $121 ATH. Adding regime-conditional routing and silver-specific features (COT, ETF flows, gold-silver ratio z-score) is highest priority for improving XAG hit rate.

key_predictive_features: Gold price (#1 cross-asset predictor per TFT analysis)

fundamental_drivers.halving_cycle: Post-halving cycle dynamics. Historically 12-18 months post-halving is strongest period. Currently 25 months post-April 2024 halving.
fundamental_drivers.etf_demand: ETF demand floor with +4500 BTC net YTD despite recent outflow streak. BlackRock IBIT holds $62B. Institutional anchor for price.
fundamental_drivers.mstr_accumulation: MicroStrategy holds 843K BTC. Continued weekly purchases via ATM program creating consistent bid.
fundamental_drivers.fed_policy: Potential Fed rate cuts in H2 2026 would be tailwind for risk assets including BTC. CPI at 3.8% is headwind until cuts materialize.

cross_asset_correlations.XAU: 0.4-0.6 (moderate positive, both 'hard money' assets, correlation regime shifts are predictive)
cross_asset_correlations.SPX: 0.5 (moderate positive, BTC increasingly trades as risk asset)
cross_asset_correlations.US10Y: -0.3 (weak inverse, higher yields compress risk asset valuations)

seasonal_patterns.weak_months: May (historically weak, 'sell in May' effect applies to BTC)
seasonal_patterns.post_halving: 12-18 months post-halving historically produces cycle peak. April 2024 halving implies peak window April 2025-October 2025 already passed, but cycle may be extended.
seasonal_patterns.current_position: Late May — entering historically mixed summer. Q3 breakout potential based on prior cycles (2021, 2023, 2024 all had significant Q3 rallies).

recommended_new_signals.description: Track rolling 30-day correlation between gold and BTC. Regime shifts in correlation (from positive to negative or vice versa) are predictive of BTC direction changes.
Z-score of rolling 5-day net ETF flows. Extreme outflows (z < -2) are contrarian BUY signal. Extreme inflows (z > 2) signal overheating.
DXY 20-day EMA direction as BTC regime signal. Rising DXY = headwind for BTC (reduce BUY confidence), falling DXY = tailwind (boost BUY confidence).
Partition MVRV Z-Score into actionable zones: <0 (deep value BUY), 0-1 (fair value HOLD), 1-3 (heated reduce), >3 (euphoria SELL). Currently at 0.41 = fair value HOLD.

deep_dives.implementation_notes: BTC consensus accuracy at 52.7%. Key issues: on-chain signal has only 45 samples (unreliable), no gold-BTC correlation signal exists despite gold being #1 predictor, ETF flows not tracked as a signal. BTC at $73K is fair-value per MVRV Z-Score 0.41. Adding MVRV zone-based regime signal and gold-BTC correlation tracking would address the two largest gaps in BTC signal coverage.
